entries.claim: After 2017, most W-2 employees can't deduct unreimbursed home office expenses.
Business credit cards often have high APRs (18-25%+)
Credit cards or personal loans above about 10–12% interest usually come before extra 529 contributions.
Employee-paid disability benefits with after-tax dollars are usually tax-free.
Employer-paid disability benefits are usually taxable.
Seattle and WA require advance notice for rent hikes (often 60 days+).
Seattle generally requires a 'just cause' to terminate a tenancy.
